---
title: "Research Highlights"
---

::: {.image-grid}
::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NE_cover_2025.png" alt="Nature Electronics cover">
  <figcaption><a href="https://www.nature.com/natelectron/volumes/8/issues/7"> Memristive system-on-a-Chip (SoC) </a></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/CeNN_chip.JPG" alt="Nature Electronics CeNN chip">
  <figcaption><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-025-01559-z"> CMOS-based cellular neural network </a></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NS_sensing.svg" alt="Nature Sensor News">
  <figcaption><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s44460-025-00025-9"> Neuromorphic sensing system</a></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NREE_dir.svg" alt="Review paper on Nautre Reviews Electrical Engineering">
  <figcaption><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s44287-024-00037-6"> Memristor-based AI accelerator </a></figcaption>
</figure>
:::
